rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks within `annex agree {** ... **};` scope of the target component.
Use `assume`, `guarantee`, `eq`, `const`, and `assign` syntax as per AGREE specification.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be scoped to the owning component and reference only visible identifiers.
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed in the model.
Use exact component and port names from the AADL model for AGREE expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Assumptions and guarantees must be labeled with quoted strings.
Assignments are used for implementation-level bindings in component implementations.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names like Period or Deadline as AGREE variables.
Do not copy identifiers from examples or invent new ports/components not in the model.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and their automatic exposure in AGREE scope
Model fusion and component insertion locations
